overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game (Red Dead Redemption 2), showing a character riding a horse through a rustic frontier settlement with log cabins and wooden structures. The horse moves along a wooden walkway, transitions to a dirt path, and enters a corral area with other horses.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden walkway between log cabin buildings

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at walking pace along a raised wooden walkway between rustic buildings

notable_agents.action: man sitting on a log near the wooden fence watching the rider pass
man standing near the fence ahead, observing the approaching horse

entered.detail: dark wooden log wall of a frontier building with visible timber construction
elevated wooden plank walkway with railings on the sides
two-story white wooden house with a gabled roof and front porch, main building of the settlement
rough-hewn log fence railing lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a horse being ridden along a wooden walkway in a frontier settlement. The path is flanked by a log cabin wall on the left and a wooden fence on the right. Two NPCs are visible near the fence - one seated on a log and another standing. The large white house serves as a focal point ahead, partially shaded by surrounding trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path leading to central settlement area

events.description: horse steps off wooden walkway onto dirt ground, entering the open muddy area of the settlement
other horses come into view tied up near the buildings on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride through the muddy dirt area, approaching the central corral

notable_agents.action: man walking ahead in the dirt path toward the white house

entered.detail: muddy dirt ground with patches of grass and hoof prints
small red wooden barn or shed with a sloped roof
group of horses tied to hitching posts near the buildings

segments.scene_description: The horse transitions from the wooden walkway onto a muddy dirt path, opening up into a wider settlement area. The large white house draws closer ahead, while a red barn appears on the right. Other horses become visible tied up on the left side as the rider approaches the central corral area.

events.description: horse slows down significantly as it enters the area with other horses
horse comes to a complete stop near the other horses and an NPC

agents.ego_description: bringing the horse to a stop among the other horses in the corral area

notable_agents.action: man walking among the horses, possibly tending to them

entered.detail: cluster of purple lupine flowers growing on the right side of the path
wooden hitching post where horses are tied

segments.scene_description: The rider slows the horse to a stop in a wide corral area where several other horses are gathered near hitching posts. Purple wildflowers are visible on the right side of the dirt ground. An NPC walks among the horses on the left as the camera comes to rest, with the large white house now visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic frontier settlement that transitions from a narrow wooden walkway into an open corral area. It begins by following a horse along a wooden path flanked by a log cabin and a fence where two NPCs linger, with a large white house visible in the distance. As the horse moves forward, the wooden walkway gives way to a muddy dirt path that opens the scene to reveal a red barn on the right and other horses tied up on the left. The perspective then shifts into a wide corral as the rider slows to a stop, passing purple wildflowers on the dirt ground. Finally, the camera comes to rest among several gathered horses and a walking NPC, with the large white house now serving as the backdrop.
